pages.speaker: Mom
pages.text: Good morning, {player_name}! Today's the day you get your first Sneaker from Professor Sole.

pages.speaker: Mom
pages.text: Be careful out there. And don't forget to come back and visit!

pages.speaker: Mom
pages.text: You got your first Sneaker! I'm so proud of you, {player_name}.

pages.speaker: Mom
pages.text: Your rival {rival_name} already ran ahead. Don't let them get too far!

pages.speaker: Trainer
pages.text: Hey there! New to Sneaker battling? Use Arrow Keys or WASD to move around.

pages.speaker: Trainer
pages.text: Press Z or Enter to interact with things. X to cancel. Escape for the menu.

pages.speaker: Trainer
pages.text: Hold Shift to sprint! Good luck on your journey.

pages.speaker: Sneaker Fan
pages.text: Did you know Sneakers have different Factions? Each Faction has strengths and weaknesses.

pages.speaker: Sneaker Fan
pages.text: For example, Drip-type moves are super effective against Heat-types! Learn the matchups!

pages.speaker: Old Man
pages.text: Back in my day, we only had one Sneaker and we liked it!

pages.speaker: Kid
pages.text: I heard Professor Sole has THREE starter Sneakers to choose from!

choices.text: I already know which one I want.

pages.speaker: Kid
pages.text: I want the rarest one! Someday I'll be the greatest Sneaker trainer ever!
BOXFRESH TOWN — A Fragrant Place to Start!

pages.speaker: Mom
pages.text: Let me take a look at those sneakers... There! Good as new!

pages.speaker: Mom
pages.text: Welcome home, {player_name}! Want me to heal your sneakers?
